summary: Rebrand verification 'SK Sharma Consultancy' -> 'S.K. Sharma & Co.'. Repo-wide grep confirms ALL user-facing .tsx source files (index/onboarding/register-choice/register-company/offboarded/profile/companies), app.json, and backend/server.py (title, email templates, /api/ health endpoint, seed admin) now use the new brand. Backend GET /api/ verified via curl returns {"app":"S.K. Sharma & Co.","ok":true}. Landing screen renders correctly on 375x667 mobile viewport: brand shows 'S.K. Sharma' on line 1 and '& Co.' on line 2, legal footer says 'By continuing you agree to S.K. Sharma & Co. Terms & Privacy.', both Admin sign in and Employee sign in buttons render with correct testIDs and route to /admin-pin-login and /pin-login respectively (both currently render Expo 'Unmatched Route' 404 — EXPECTED, per problem statement pin-login screens are not yet built). HOWEVER two misses were found: (1) HIGH: the logo image asset /app/frontend/assets/images/logo-mark.png still visibly displays the OLD brand text 'SK SHARMA CONSULTANCY / COMPLIANCE PAYROLL MANPOWER' baked into the PNG — clearly visible on the landing screen inside the top circular badge. The generator script scripts/generate_logo.py has been updated to new brand but the PNG files in assets/images were never regenerated (or a different image was placed there). (2) LOW: /app/design_guidelines.json has 3 references to old brand (docs only, non-runtime), and 2 backend regression tests (test_resend_integration.py:165, test_otp_and_regression.py:31) still assert the old brand string and will fail if re-run.

minor.issue: Assertion still expects 'SK Sharma Consultancy <onboarding@resend.dev>' — will fail; needs updating to 'S.K. Sharma & Co. <onboarding@resend.dev>'
Assertion still expects j['app'] == 'SK Sharma Consultancy' — will fail; needs updating to 'S.K. Sharma & Co.'

ui_bugs.issue: The PNG file itself still contains baked-in OLD brand text 'SK SHARMA CONSULTANCY' with 'COMPLIANCE PAYROLL MANPOWER' subtitle. Visible on landing screen and every screen that uses this logo. The generator scripts/generate_logo.py has been updated to 'S.K. SHARMA & CO.' but was never re-run to regenerate the PNGs (icon.png, adaptive-icon.png, logo-mark.png, splash-image.png, logo.png, favicon.png likely all stale). Run: python /app/scripts/generate_logo.py

issues: Lines 3, 108, 134 still contain 'SK Sharma Consultancy' — non-runtime doc but should be updated for consistency

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow.' emitted twice on landing screen render. Reference: /app/src/theme (shadow.card / shadow.cta usage in index.tsx styles). Non-blocking but should migrate to boxShadow for RN 0.76+/web.

Console warning 'Image: style.resizeMode is deprecated. Please use props.resizeMode.' Reference: expo-image usage in /app/frontend/app/index.tsx:38-42 (logo Image). Move resizeMode/contentFit out of style prop.

action_items: HIGH: Regenerate all logo PNGs by running `python /app/scripts/generate_logo.py` — current logo-mark.png visibly displays old 'SK SHARMA CONSULTANCY' text on landing screen, defeating the rebrand.
LOW: Update /app/design_guidelines.json lines 3, 108, 134 from 'SK Sharma Consultancy' to 'S.K. Sharma & Co.'
LOW: Update stale assertions in backend/tests/test_resend_integration.py:165 and backend/tests/test_otp_and_regression.py:31 to new brand string (tests will fail otherwise on next regression run).
OPTIONAL: Address deprecated shadow*/resizeMode warnings from theme + expo-image usage (minor, not blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: Rebrand text changes are complete across all .tsx source, app.json, and server.py — well done.
But image assets containing brand text were not regenerated; source-level string replace alone is insufficient when brand is baked into raster assets. Add a build step / regen the PNGs.
Design docs (design_guidelines.json) diverging from code is a documentation debt risk.

success_rate.backend: 100% (health endpoint and all source strings correct; only stale test assertions remain)
success_rate.frontend: 90% (all text strings correct; logo image asset still displays old brand)

context_for_next_testing_agent: After main agent regenerates PNGs via `python /app/scripts/generate_logo.py`, re-open landing screen at 375x667 and visually confirm the circular logo badge no longer shows 'SK SHARMA CONSULTANCY'. Also grep-check design_guidelines.json and the two backend test files. Ignore /admin-pin-login and /pin-login 404s — those screens are on the main agent's next-iteration backlog.
rca_of_issue: Root cause of the remaining rebrand miss: the brand name lived in TWO places — (a) source text strings (updated correctly) and (b) rasterized PNG logos in /app/frontend/assets/images/ (NOT regenerated). The generator script scripts/generate_logo.py was updated to write the new brand but was never executed after the update, so the on-disk PNGs still contain the old wordmark. Mitigation: run the generator once, or add a pre-commit / post-checkout hook to regenerate assets when generate_logo.py changes.
